articles.author: Joe Light
articles.title: Fair Isaac Stock Drops After U.S. Agencies Announce Alternative Credit Scores Can Be Used in Mortgage Decisions - Barron's
articles.description: The move could open the housing market to more Americans, but challenges the effective control that Fair Isaac Corp. has held on the mortgage market until now.
articles.content: Two of the U.S. governments main mortgage agencies will soon let borrowers use alternative credit scores to apply for loansa move that could open the housing market to more Americans, but challenges … [+83 chars]

articles.title: A Major Pollen Surge Is Coming—These 20 US Cities Will Be Hit Hardest - marthastewart.com
articles.description: The Asthma and Allergy Foundation of America’s Allergy Capitals report ranks the largest 100 cities in the contiguous U.S. by how challenging they are to live in when you have a pollen allergy. Here are the top 20 places.
articles.content: If it feels like allergy season is starting earlier and getting stronger, you're not wrong. Clinicians and researchers have observed an earlier, longer, and more intense pollen season in many regions… [+1603 chars]
